creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 177215
Proposed patch (since 423383 revision)

Patch to update devel/tig port from 2.2 to 2.2.1 version.

Look following links for changes:
https://jonas.github.io/tig/NEWS.html#_tig_2_2_1
https://github.com/jonas/tig/releases/tag/tig-2.2.1
https://github.com/jonas/tig/compare/tig-2.2...tig-2.2.1

- Update MASTER_SITES and WWW
- Remove patch, which was applied by upstream

The build was tested on FreeBSD 10.2 amd64.
